promoted_facts.fact: Guaranty is personal, irrevocable, unconditional, joint and several, includes spouse
RBI total debt structure: Term Loan B $4,726M, Term Loan A $1,275M, multiple senior notes totaling $13.6B gross
Carrols acquisition total consideration $648M ($543M cash + $15M pre-existing balances + $90M existing equity), $431M assumed debt extinguished
BK segment adjusted operating income $410M for 2024
Property revenues (lease income) $837M in 2024 ($367M min + $465M variable + $4M direct financing)
No goodwill or brand impairment in 2024, 2023, 2022
State addenda override matrix: forum selection voided (CA, MI, WA), general release restricted (CA, MI, WA), noncompete limited (CA)
